Who I Am

About Me

Sanjyot Tiranik

📍 MIT Academy of Engineering, Pune

I'm a Computer Science student with a genuine passion for software development, data analytics, and problem-solving. Currently pursuing my degree at MITAOE, I thrive at the intersection of technology and creativity.

My journey in tech began with Python, where I discovered the power of code to automate real-world tasks. Since then, I've expanded into web development, database management, and data visualisation — building projects that solve practical problems.

I'm a collaborative team player who communicates clearly, adapts quickly, and never stops learning. I'm eager to contribute to impactful projects and grow as a developer through hands-on experience.

🎓 B.E. Computer Science 📊 Data Enthusiast 🔧 Problem Solver 🚀 Fast Learner
